name: Benjamin Hill Mining Corp.
description: Benjamin Hill Mining Corp. is a Canadian junior exploration company focused on exploring and developing high-grade mineral properties. The company's primary assets include the Alotta project, a copper-gold-molybdenum porphyry prospect in the Yukon Territory, Canada, and the Sonora Gold project in Sonora, Mexico. Benjamin Hill Mining Corp. is dedicated to creating shareholder value through systematic exploration and strategic acquisitions in historically productive mining districts.
